name: Bulgar Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the water to a boil.
2. Add the bulghur and reduce heat. Cook for 20 minutes until soft and water is absorbed. Set aside.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions and sauté for 3 minutes.
5. Add beets, carrots, and cabbage; sauté for another 7 minutes.
6. Stir in seasonings.
7. Remove from heat and mix with bulghur.
8. Shape the mixture into burgers to fit buns.
9. Place on an oiled baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
10. Turn over and bake for 29 more minutes.
